title: Data Scientist
description: Data Scientist for forecasting models and resource planning at Copenhagen Airport. Work with prognosis models, ML, statistical modelling. Moving to Databricks. Cross-functional collaboration with Security, Digital, Airside Operations. Python, SQL required, Databricks and Power BI preferred.
match_reasons: Strong Python and SQL|ML and statistical modelling from thesis and coursework|Power BI from Illuminera IQVIA|Cross-functional collaboration experience
gaps: Danish language required (basic level)|No forecasting or resource estimation experience|No airport operations domain knowledge|Police clearance required
